accessory.name: Accessory
accessory.description: While examining the murder scene, it seems to be some kind of accessory that Shawit dropped.

BodyPosition.text: If the back of the head took the fatal blow, the body should be...

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: {fadeInCharacter}{sprite:Gumshoe["Determined"]}{startBGM:investigation}{blip:1}This is the murder scene, pal.{nl}It's dark because we're past closing.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: Mr. Shawit, the one who found the body, was standing right here.{nl}On the first floor of the event hall, pal.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter}{bgMove:top}{p:500}{showTextbox}See up there? The upper levels form an atrium.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: The victim, Ms. Nakaki, was reportedly up there on the 4th floor railing, pal.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: {blip:0}{color:lightblue}(That's a long drop... but I can still see it clearly from here.){color:white}

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: {color:white}{hideTextbox}{bgMove:bottom}{p:100}{showTextbox}{blip:1}The current theory is that Maggey pushed her from up there...{nl}and she landed right beneath this railing, pal.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead2"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter}{p:200}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead"]}{showTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}And this is just my read on it, pal, but...{nl}time of death and discovery might be the same.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: The victim fell from the event hall's 4th floor...{nl}and landed right in front of the man who found her, pal.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Gumshoe
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: Cause of death was blunt-force trauma to the back of the head from the fall...{nl}A fatal contusion. Looks like death was instant, right here, pal.

Crime_Scene_Intro.name: Phoenix
Crime_Scene_Intro.text: I see...{nl}All right. Time to start the investigation.{setState:Crime_Scene_Intro_done,true}{sectionEnd}

Examine_Body.name: Phoenix
Examine_Body.text: {showCharacter}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{blip:1}She died still wearing the Steel Samurai suit and mask...

Examine_Body.name: Phoenix
Examine_Body.text: Huh...? The victim died from a severe blow to the back of the head, right?

Examine_Body.name: Phoenix
Examine_Body.text: Right now, the body is lying face down.

Examine_Body.name: Phoenix
Examine_Body.text: But then, logically, a body with that kind of injury should be...{jump:Body_Lying_Question}{sectionEnd}

Body_Lying_Face_Down.name: Phoenix
Body_Lying_Face_Down.text: {showCharacter}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{blip:0}{color:lightblue}(No... that doesn't line up if the back of her head took the blow.){color:white}{jump:Body_Lying_Question}

Body_Lying_Face_Up.name: Phoenix
Body_Lying_Face_Up.text: {showCharacter}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{blip:1}Then she should be lying face-up, shouldn't she?

Body_Lying_Face_Up.name: Gumshoe
Body_Lying_Face_Up.text: {sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}Ah...{nl}Now that you mention it, that's true, pal.

Body_Lying_Face_Up.name: Gumshoe
Body_Lying_Face_Up.text: But weirdly enough, she's got cuts and bruises on her face too, not just the back of her head, pal.

Body_Lying_Face_Up.name: Phoenix
Body_Lying_Face_Up.text: {blip:0}{color:lightblue}(So she has injuries on both the back of the head and the face...){color:white}

Body_Lying_Face_Up.name: Gumshoe
Body_Lying_Face_Up.text: {blip:1}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}That blood on the floor's seeping out through the gaps in the mask, pal.{setState:body_investigated,true}{jump:Body_Examined}{sectionEnd}

Examine_Background.name: Gumshoe
Examine_Background.text: {showCharacter}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{blip:1}We checked every floor and even the ceiling, pal.{nl}No traps. No gimmicks.

Examine_Out.name: Phoenix
Examine_Out.text: {showCharacter}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{blip:1}Were there any regular guests around at the time?

Examine_Out.name: Gumshoe
Examine_Out.text: {sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}There weren't any, pal.{nl}This place closes at 9 PM.

Examine_Out.name: Phoenix
Examine_Out.text: {blip:0}{color:lightblue}(Then there are no outside witnesses to question...){setState:out_investigated,true}{jump:Body_Examined}{sectionEnd}

Examine_Floor.name: Gumshoe
Examine_Floor.text: {showCharacter}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{blip:1}She died still wearing the Steel Samurai suit and mask...

Examine_Floor.name: Gumshoe
Examine_Floor.text: We've confirmed nothing else fell down with the body, pal.{setState:floor_investigated,true}{jump:Body_Examined}{sectionEnd}

Shawit_Appears.name: Shawit
Shawit_Appears.text: {blip:1}{fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Shawit["Stand"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}Oh, conducting your crime scene investigation?{nl}Thank you for your hard work.

Shawit_Appears.name: Shawit
Shawit_Appears.text: {fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Shawit["Stand"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}Coming back here still hurts...{nl}As the chief, this is truly heartbreaking.

Shawit_Appears.name: Shawit
Shawit_Appears.text: How can I put this...{nl}Just remembering that moment makes my hair stand on end.

Shawit_Appears.name: Shawit
Shawit_Appears.text: Even now, every hair on my body is standing straight up...

Shawit_Appears.name: Gumshoe
Shawit_Appears.text: {fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}Mr. Shawit...{nl}Your hair isn't standing up at all, pal.

Shawit_Appears.name: Shawit
Shawit_Appears.text: {fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Shawit["Stand"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}W-well....{nl}Standing on end is just a figure of speech.

Shawit_Appears.name: Phoenix
Shawit_Appears.text: {color:lightblue}(Detective Gumshoe...{nl}Is he implying Mr. Shawit wears a toupee?){color:white}

Shawit_Appears.name: Phoenix
Shawit_Appears.text: {color:lightblue}(I mean... a toupee probably wouldn't stand on end.){color:white}

Shawit_Appears.name: Shawit
Shawit_Appears.text: {sprite:Shawit["Stand"]}Putting that aside...{nl}I hope this case is resolved quickly.

Shawit_Appears.name: Shawit
Shawit_Appears.text: I pray for the victim's soul...{nl}Well then.{fadeOutCharacter:300}

Shawit_Appears.name: Phoenix
Shawit_Appears.text: What's this?{nl}Looks like some kind of accessory.

Shawit_Appears.name: Gumshoe
Shawit_Appears.text: {fadeOutCharacter:300}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter:300}You're right, pal.{nl}That wasn't there a minute ago...

Shawit_Appears.name: Phoenix
Shawit_Appears.text: {blip:0}{color:lightblue}(I'll hold onto this as evidence for now.)
{addEvidence:accessory,true}{playSound:evidenceUnlock}{color:lightblue}{blip:0}Data for "Accessory" updated in the Court Record.

Shawit_Appears.name: Phoenix
Shawit_Appears.text: (All right, I think that's everything here.)

Shawit_Appears.name: Phoenix
Shawit_Appears.text: (Once I've gathered everything I can, it's time for court.{nl}That's where I'll bring the truth to light!){setState:crime_scene_done,true}{jump:Crime_Scene_Finish}{sectionEnd}
